name: chat-lms-agent
description: Deterministic command-surface hooks for the Chat LMS teacher agent: lesson/wordbook prompt routing, private-profile context hydration, and a tool-safety gate. Acts only inside a Chat LMS teaching workspace.

interface.longDescription: Wires the chat_lms_agent harness into Codex: UserPromptSubmit lesson/wordbook routing so panel/wordbook requests hit the deterministic CLI fast-path instead of manual exploration, SessionStart private-profile hydration, and a PreToolUse safety gate. Every hook self-gates to directories containing .chat-lms-profile.json, so non-teaching projects are never touched.
